Metadata.title: Martinshof Rothenburg Diakoniewerk – Work, Education & Participation
Metadata.description: Martinshof Rothenburg Diakoniewerk supports people with assistance needs through work participation, development, consulting and individual opportunities.
Metadata.keywords: Martinshof, Rothenburg, Diakoniewerk, work participation, inclusion, support, education
Metadata.ogDescription: Work participation, development and individual support for people with assistance needs.

Hero.title: Comfortable accommodation for your employees
Hero.description: Ideal for construction, installation and industrial projects in Lower Austria. Quiet location, practical facilities and uncomplicated booking.

TargetGroups.title: Which companies this is suitable for
TargetGroups.description: Our apartments are designed for companies that assign employees to projects in Austria. Suitable for construction, assembly and industrial teams that need a reliable and clear accommodation solution.

WhyMartinshof.title: Why companies choose us
WhyMartinshof.description: As a family-run winery in the Weinviertel region, we offer not only accommodation but also a reliable and practical solution for companies and their employees.

Funktional.title: Functional Clear Designed for work teams
Funktional.description: The apartments provide everything employees need during a project: separate sleeping areas, a private kitchen and a quiet environment after work.

apartments.title: 2–3 separate apartments
apartments.text: Flexible layout for smaller and larger work teams.

persons.title: 4–6 persons per apartment
persons.text: Enough space for employees during short-term or long-term projects.

kitchen.title: Private kitchen
kitchen.text: Practically equipped for shared cooking and self-catering.

livingArea.title: Living area
livingArea.text: A separate area for eating, relaxing and gathering.

equipped.title: Fully equipped
equipped.text: Everything essential is available – functional, clean and uncomplicated.

anneMari.name: Apartment Anne-Mari
anneMari.text: Functional accommodation for teams that need a clear and uncomplicated housing solution.

erich.name: Apartment Erich
erich.text: Ideal for fitters, construction and project teams that need separate sleeping options.

herwig.name: Apartment Herwig
herwig.text: Quietly located, well maintained and designed for longer employee stays.

errors.nameInvalid: The name may only contain letters and must be at least 2 characters long.

errors.privacyRequired: Please agree to the Privacy Policy.

ConditionsSection.title: How we work
ConditionsSection.description: No complicated booking process, but direct coordination and a solution that fits your project.

process.rentalDuration: Flexible rental period: weekly or monthly
process.pricing: Individual pricing depending on your needs

location.title: Quiet location
location.text: Relaxed surroundings in the Weinviertel region

vienna.title: Close to Vienna
vienna.text: Only 30 minutes from Vienna, 5 minutes from the A5 motorway

general.title: 2. General information
general.text: The protection of your personal data is important to us. We treat your personal data confidentially and in accordance with the applicable data protection regulations.

contactForm.title: 3. Contact form
contactForm.text: If you contact us via the contact form, we use the information you provide exclusively to process your request.

legalBasis.title: 4. Legal basis
legalBasis.before: Processing is carried out in accordance with
legalBasis.after: if your request serves to initiate a contractual relationship.

storage.title: 5. Storage period
storage.text: Your data will only be stored for as long as necessary to process your request or as required by statutory retention obligations.

disclosure.title: 6. Disclosure of data
disclosure.text: Your personal data will not be passed on to third parties unless there is a legal obligation to do so. Email services are used for the technical transmission of contact requests.

cookies.title: 7. Cookies
cookies.text: This website uses technically necessary cookies. Analytics or marketing cookies are only used with your prior consent.

contact.title: 9. Contact
contact.text: If you have any questions about data protection, please contact us at:
